scripts.stop: docker-compose down && docker builder prune -f --filter 'until=24h' && docker image prune -f && docker container prune -f
scripts.clean: docker-compose down && docker system prune -a --volumes -f && ../../gradlew --stop && rm -rf .gradle/ apps/*/build/ apps/*/.next/ .turbo/ .claude/worktrees/ && find . -name 'hs_err_pid*.log' -delete && find . -name 'replay_pid*.log' -delete && echo 'Clean complete.'
